find_python_files: find all Python files matching a glob pattern in the project directory
find_files_recursively: find all TypeScript files recursively using a double star glob pattern
list_files_in_subdir: list all JavaScript files under a specific subdirectory using glob
resolve_path_relative: resolve a file path relative to the tool context working directory
get_tool_parameters: get the parameter schema for the glob tool including pattern and path
